title: hieracium schmidtii subsp. rotenburgense
intro: Hieracium schmidtii subsp. rotenburgense, also known as a rare subspecies of Hawkweed, is a flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly due to its high content of flavonoids and sesquiterpene lactones, which exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Hieracium schmidtii subsp. rotenburgense include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of this plant may include teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and optimal uses.
